reflectionQuestion: Are you sitting like a gargoyle guarding a medieval cathedral right now? Take a deep breath, drop your shoulders away from your ears, and ask yourself: What heavy burden are you carrying today that doesn't actually belong to you?
sarcasticQuote: "My shoulders are up here to keep my ears warm, obviously, and not because I'm micromanaging 14 crises that are out of my control."

reflectionQuestion: What did you agree to in the last 24 hours that made your stomach twist? What truth are you swallowing to maintain a false peace in a relationship or at work?
sarcasticQuote: "I love digesting passive-aggressive feedback for breakfast, it goes so well with my stomach acid and daily regret."

reflectionQuestion: Are you currently trying to calculate 50 moves ahead in a game you aren't even playing? What would happen if you accepted that you cannot control the outcome of next week?
sarcasticQuote: "If I just think about this problem for 4 more hours straight, I'm sure the universe will bend to my specific desires out of sheer exhaustion."

reflectionQuestion: Who has access to your emotional energy without a ticket? Is your skin flaring or your energy draining because you are acting as a free emotional charging station for everyone else?
sarcasticQuote: "Please, walk all over my boundaries. I have plenty of skin cells to regenerate, and I love feeling physically exhausted for other people's comfort."

reflectionQuestion: Unclench your jaw right now. Is your tongue pressed hard against the roof of your mouth? What unspoken words are you literally biting down on?
sarcasticQuote: "I hold my tension in my teeth because crushing my own enamel is much cheaper than telling people how I actually feel."
